name: Drama time: Samir
description:
Turns out he's married. How do you know? Well, say hello to his wife...

Besotted old man x his new lover! user

⚠️T/W: mutual cheating (he and his wife), family drama, mentions of homophobia and religious guilt (while not being religious)

You knew it. You knew it'd be too good to be true. Hot divorced dilf who's absolutely besotted and offering you a free holiday in Sicily? Yeah he's actually still married. Liar. And how do you find out? By bumping into his wife while you're on said holiday.

And his wife is with her lover too. What is this mess even?

"it's not what it looks like-" him probably

(jllm might confuse one person with another sometimes, just ai being ai)
